meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no design skills (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no design skills. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup: Ship Professional Designs Without Skills
content.seo_description: Overcome the design barrier as a freelancer. Use this beginner-friendly checklist to master Claude Code and Antigravity for high-end, rapid SaaS builds.
content.answer_block: You don't need design skills to ship premium SaaS products. By combining Claude Code's autonomous engineering capabilities with Antigravity's rapid UI scaffolding, you can transform text prompts into pixel-perfect, responsive interfaces. This workflow automates the heavy lifting, allowing you to focus on logic while delivering high-value client work instantly.
content.intro:
The blank canvas is a freelancer's greatest enemy. You have the backend logic, the database schema, and the business requirements, but the interface stares back at you—a reminder that your code is functional, but ugly. You are trapped between paying a premium for a designer or spending weeks learning CSS frameworks that shift every quarter.

Relief has arrived. We are entering the era of the 'AI Architect,' where the gap between intent and implementation has collapsed. By leveraging Claude Code and Antigravity, you can bypass the design phase entirely, letting AI interpret your functional requirements into high-conversion interfaces. It’s time to stop worrying about padding and focus on shipping.

steps.title: Environment Audit
steps.description: Ensure your terminal is primed for AI-assisted development. Verify Anthropic API keys are set and Claude Code is authorized to access your project root.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and recommend a standardized directory layout for a scalable SaaS application.

steps.title: UI Component Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to define your UI design system requirements before writing any business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Tailwind-based design system configuration file that follows modern SaaS aesthetics, including primary/secondary color palettes, typography scale, and spacing tokens.
steps.claude_code_command: claude "generate a tailwind.config.js file based on the design tokens provided by antigravity"

steps.title: Autonomous View Generation
steps.description: Translate your functional needs into visual components. Keep the prompt focused on user flow rather than CSS properties.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive dashboard landing page component that includes a sidebar, header, and a card-based data summary section.
steps.claude_code_command: claude "create a new component file for the dashboard layout using the generated design tokens"

steps.title: Dynamic State Integration
steps.description: Connect your UI to your backend logic using Claude Code to handle the data fetching layer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a clean, reusable React hook to fetch and cache data from my API endpoint, handling loading and error states.
steps.claude_code_command: claude "integrate the data fetching hook into the dashboard component created in step 3"

steps.title: Visual Iteration & Polish
steps.description: Use iterative prompts to refine the UI. Treat the AI like a junior designer: give feedback on specific elements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current dashboard layout and improve the visual hierarchy by adding subtle border-shadows and increasing whitespace between cards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude "apply the suggested visual refinements to the dashboard component"

pro_tips: Always define your design system tokens first; it prevents the AI from choosing inconsistent colors or spacing units.
Use 'claude status' frequently to ensure the agent understands the current file context before pushing large changes.
Request AI-generated JSDoc comments for all UI components to maintain readability for future client handoffs.
Bypass complex CSS by asking the AI to 'use component-first architecture' to simplify maintenance.
Run 'claude commit' after every successful design iteration to maintain a clean, granular history for your client.
content.next_steps: Once your UI is functional, perform a security audit on your API routes and prepare your project for deployment to Vercel or Netlify.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting design debt stall your freelance career. Harness the power of autonomous engineering to ship faster and charge more. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
